Fission dynamics in the reaction U-238(P,F) at E(p)=
A Pu-242 was used as target.
.Calculations were carried in the framework of
the multiple-source model, which included evaporation
spectra from individual fragments and compound nuclei-
using experimental data on the kinetic energies and
neutron multiplicities. The total kinetic energies was
be extracted by integrating over solid angle the
difference between experimental spectra and calculated
ones within the multiple-source model. The neutron
statistical emission was supposed to be isotopic in the
source frame. The post-scission neutron multiplicity
have been extracted and reported as function of
